The direct comparison of certain figures published from August 2024 onwards with previously published data requires caution for the following reasons:

1. Since August 2020, NRB has been publishing "Summary of Balance of Payments as per BPM6"  which was prepared by mapping the standard components from the BPM5 Table to BPM6 using the conversion matrix proposed by the International Monetary Fund. The underlying data was collected and compiled using the Balance of Payments Manual, 5th Edition (BPM5).
2. Since August 2024, NRB has been collecting and compiling data in accordance with the Balance of Payments Manual 6th Edition (BPM6).
3. Due to this methodological change, certain components, particularly those related to services, are not directly comparable and should be approached with caution when making direct comparisons.

4. Some components, which were previously consolidated under a single heading, have now been disaggregated into multiple headings and some have been reclassified. In this Table, values for such components are presented with a "Dash" for period before August 2024.
5. Personal transfers (1.C.2.1) now encompass workers' remittances and other personal transfers. So, comparison with figures before August 2024 requires caution.
